name: I have pre-existing hearing issues, can I still claim new work-related loss?
description: Yes, for aggravation portion with medical proof.[1]

mainEntity.name: I have pre-existing hearing issues, can I still claim new work-related loss?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for aggravation portion with medical proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, you can claim aggravation or new loss superimposed on pre-existing conditions if work noise substantially contributed.** Apportionment applies; only work-related portion compensable in Idaho per §72-406.[1] Need comparative audiograms and doctor opinions isolating job impact.[2] Common in long-career workers; prove acceleration.[1] Medical experts key.
